userMessage: Create a no-surprises baseline flow for this scope model mso6b that is safe to run repeatedly.

response.text:
Creating a repeatable baseline flow for MSO6B that clears/reset the instrument, waits for completion, checks errors, and reads IDN before disconnecting.

ACTIONS_JSON: {"summary":"Creating repeatable baseline flow (connect -> clear/reset -> OPC wait -> error check -> IDN query -> disconnect).","findings":[],"suggestedFixes":["Auto-repaired missing/duplicate step ids in replace_flow actions for apply compatibility.","Filled connect/disconnect instrumentIds with workspace alias \"MSO6B\" for direct chat apply compatibility."],"actions":[{"type":"replace_flow","flow":{"name":"MSO6B Baseline (Safe Reset)","description":"Repeatable, no-surprises baseline: clear status, reset instrument, wait for completion, perform error check, read IDN, then disconnect.","backend":"pyvisa","deviceType":"SCOPE","steps":[{"type":"connect","label":"Connect","params":{"instrumentIds":["MSO6B"],"printIdn":true},"id":"s1_1"},{"type":"write","label":"Clear Status and Reset","params":{"command":"*CLS;*RST"},"id":"s1_2"},{"type":"query","label":"Wait for Reset Completion","params":{"command":"*OPC?","saveAs":"opc_after_reset"},"id":"s1_3"},{"type":"error_check","label":"Error Check","params":{"command":"ALLEV?"},"id":"s1_4"},{"type":"query","label":"Read Instrument IDN","params":{"command":"*IDN?","saveAs":"idn_baseline"},"id":"s1_5"},{"type":"disconnect","label":"Disconnect","params":{"instrumentIds":["MSO6B"]},"id":"s1_6"}]}}]}

actionsJson.summary: Creating repeatable baseline flow (connect -> clear/reset -> OPC wait -> error check -> IDN query -> disconnect).

flow.name: MSO6B Baseline (Safe Reset)
